title: Fairy coin (3d model money mod)
description:
The mod introduces a variety of currencies into the game, which can be converted from one to another using right-click (RCM). 
Mod adds drops of Gold, Silver, Copper Coin from mobs and a gacha machine, offering random loot in exchange for currency.
body:
Fairy Coin adds physical coins and other currencies to Minecraft for survival, roleplay, and multiplayer economies.

Coins can be converted between denominations with right-click, making them easy to store, exchange, and use in gameplay.

All vanilla mobs can drop coins, so players can naturally earn currency while exploring, fighting, and surviving. This makes the mod useful both as a roleplay currency system and as a survival-friendly source of rewards and progression.

The mod also includes a gacha machine that allows players to trade currency for random loot.

Included currencies:
- Gold, silver, and copper coins
- Dollars
- Casino chips
- Technical plates
- Orc teeth
- Blue and purple credits

Fairy Coin is great for shops, trading systems, server economies, roleplay servers, survival rewards, and adventure maps.
